summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ReachInsta SaaS landing website. All 11 pages functional with excellent responsive design, working navigation, dark/light mode toggle, pricing plans, FAQ accordion, contact forms, and legal pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor clicking difficulty due to form overlay interception

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, animated dashboard mockup, features grid, testimonials, CTA
Sticky navigation bar with all working links (Features, Pricing, About, FAQ, Contact, Login, Signup)
Dark/Light mode toggle functionality (switches between dark/light classes)
Pricing page with 3 plans (Free $0, Plus $49, Pro $99) and clickable CTA buttons
FAQ page accordion with 8 expandable/collapsible items
Contact form with name, email, company, message fields - all functional
Login page with email/password form and Google button
Signup page with name/email/password form and terms checkbox
Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Refund Policy pages load correctly
Footer with all required links (Pricing, Features, Terms, Privacy, Refund, Contact, FAQ)
Mobile responsiveness - mobile menu, responsive forms, proper layout
Trust badges display correctly (Secure Payments, Trusted by Creators, GDPR Ready, Cancel Anytime)
Kinetic orange (#FF4500) accent color used throughout
